title: The Executives Gather
description: Pages 1–5 focus on the executives gather, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the active characters in this part.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Bartolomeo, Unknown person #6 as doflamingo's officers prepare for decisive fights as the rebellion spreads and the final path to Doflamingo narrows.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It finally begins!!! The final battle!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: What!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: The toys are all falling apart on their own...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I knew those toys were way too big!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: There were 8 people per toy!

dialogue.speaker: Bartolomeo
dialogue.text: Woohoo! I've got my barrier back!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: She turned her own soldiers into toys!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What the hell do they think their under-lings are for these bastards!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Impossible ...Sugar...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Again!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Miss Sugar!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I almost soiled myself... I thought we were gonna have to spend the rest of our lives as toys...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Dont be ridiculous! We had every intern- tions of turning you back...Once this skirmish had been settled!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Y- Yeah! That's right! What a relief!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Obviously we would have actually have forgotten about their existences altogether...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Bellamy!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: Fufufufufu! Worried about him?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: You two, some time ago... fought in mock town, if I'm not mistaken?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: But before I knew it you'd kissed and made up.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: HAA

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: The age of daydreaming pirates...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Is long gone!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: I don't care what happened back then.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: Let Bellamy go!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: whether or not he goes will be decided by the Victor.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: After all, this guy came here to be killed by me.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: In order to ride out the giant wave soon to come...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: I'M GOING TO BOARD DOFLA- MINGO'S SHIP!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: I won't make fun of you any- more.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: Since I was a kid, I've always...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: admired Doflamingo.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: HAA

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: Someone who has

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: I respect him

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: I guess these are your...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: principles... eh, bellamy?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: You just up and attached yourself to me...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: UGGH...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: know- ing that if things didn't go the way you wanted, you could just throw a friggin' hissy fit.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: People are born with qualities they simply cannot change.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: No matter what you do or where you go...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: Someone who

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: You'll always be nothing more than a lowly thug, Bel- Larry!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: Sniff sniff

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: Fuffufu!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #43
dialogue.text: Take that back!! Bellamy's changed!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: No more! Please...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #45
dialogue.text: PLEASE... JUST KILL ME!!

summary: The Executives Gather develops the chapter's Dressrosa conflict through Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, while preserving the OCR dialogue and keeping unclear speakers readable.
